title: Assembly elections 2026 highlights: Polling officials receive EVMs in Kerala, Assam, Puducherry ahead of April 9 voting
description: Assembly elections 2026 highlights: Campaigning ended in Kerala, Assam and Puducherry, with voting set on April 9. Officials received EVMs and other materials ahead of voting. Tamil Nadu votes on April 23, Bengal on April 23 and 29 in two phases. Results are due to be announced on May 4.
